name: @aperturerobotics/bldr
description: application bundler and user interface toolkit

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.start:web:release: npm run build:release:web && npm run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr/build/web/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.start:web:release:debug: npm run build:release:web:debug && npm run bldr -- static --path ./.bldr/build/web/bldr-demo-release/dist
scripts.dist: npm run build:release:web && npm run publish:release
scripts.gen: npm run gen:proto && npm run gen:deps
scripts.gen:deps: node -e "const pkg = require('./package.json'); const distPkg = require('./dist/deps/package.json'); Object.entries(pkg.dependencies).forEach(([name, version]) => { if (distPkg.dependencies[name]) { distPkg.dependencies[name] = version; } }); Object.entries(pkg.resolutions).forEach(([name, version]) => { distPkg.resolutions[name] = version.replace(/^\^/, ''); }); require('fs').writeFileSync('./dist/deps/package.json', JSON.stringify(distPkg, null, 2));" && cd ./dist/deps && npm i --package-lock-only
scripts.format: npm run format:js && npm run format:go && npm run format:config
scripts.format:js:changed: git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep '\(\.ts\|\.tsx\|\.html\|\.css\|\.scss\)$' | grep '^\(web\|entrypoint\|example\)/' | xargs -I {} prettier --write {}
scripts.test: npm run test:js && npm run test:go
scripts.lint: npm run lint:go && npm run lint:js
scripts.prepare: npm run clean && rimraf ./.tools && npm run vendor && npm run setup
